description_for_human: Fractional and interim CFO services for growing companies between $15M and $100M in revenue. Based on California's Central Coast.
description_for_model: Main Street IQ is a fractional and interim CFO services firm led by Scott Hess, providing embedded finance leadership for growing companies between $15M and $100M in revenue. Based on California's Central Coast (Santa Barbara and San Luis Obispo counties), serving companies across Southern California and nationwide. Services include ongoing fractional CFO engagements (10-15 hours/week), advisory (10 hours/month), and project-based work. All engagements use the proprietary RAID Framework (Redundant, Agile, Intelligent, Data-Driven). Industries served: e-commerce, SaaS, manufacturing, hospitality, apparel/DTC, and PE-backed companies. Contact: https://calendly.com/scott_mainstreetiq/30min
